item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import re
import shlex
from pathlib import Path

root = Path('longhorizon-work/scenario-02')
config = json.loads((root / 'config/onboarding.json').read_text())
doc = (root / 'docs/onboarding.md').read_text()
blocks = re.findall(r'"'```sh'"\\n(.*?)\\n"'```'"', doc, flags=re.S)
expected = [
    'onboard', 'run', '--config', 'config/onboarding.json',
    '--mode', config['mode'], '--max-parallel', str(config['max_parallel']),
    '--owner', config['owner'],
]
for queue in config['queues']:
    expected.extend(['--queue', queue])
checks = {
    'example_count': len(blocks) == 1,
    'example_matches_config': len(blocks) == 1 and shlex.split(blocks[0]) == expected,
    'prose_mode': f'Run {config[\"mode\"]} onboarding' in doc,
    'prose_owner': f'{config[\"owner\"]} owner' in doc,
    'prose_parallelism': config['max_parallel'] == 3 and 'up to three jobs in parallel' in doc,
    'prose_queue_order': f'"'`{config["queues"][0]}` queue before `{config["queues"][1]}`'"' in doc,
}
for name, passed in checks.items():
    print(f'{name}={\"PASS\" if passed else \"FAIL\"}')
print('MISMATCH=' + ('no' if all(checks.values()) else 'yes'))
raise SystemExit(0 if all(checks.values()) else 1)
PY"
